name: amazing-toys-sos-backend
description: Amazing Toys Fair 2026 — Self-Order System Backend API

scripts.dev:
node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('docker inspect -f {{.State.Running}} sos_backend 2>&1').toString().trim();if(r==='true'){console.error('
⛔  ERROR: sos_backend Docker container is already running on port 3001.
    Running local dev alongside Docker will cause transactions to go to the WRONG database.
    Stop Docker first:  docker compose down
    OR use Docker instead: http://localhost:80
');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}" && nodemon src/app.js
